short: The central platform for hosting and sharing open models, datasets, and demos.
definition: The Hugging Face Hub is a collaborative website for hosting and discovering machine learning models, datasets, and demo apps called Spaces. It keeps a full history of every change so versions can be tracked, and it offers a Python toolkit so programs can download or upload its contents automatically. Hosting hundreds of thousands of community-contributed models, it has become the central home of the open-source AI world.
